2153070.name: Rats in a Cage Demo
2153070.description:
This DEMO includes whole 1st floor (out of 5) which will show you what this darkly funny corporate-themed puzzle game withing a game is all about and what to expect. You'll be introduced to the story, 1st floor mechanics, challenges and the very soul of the game. In this floor you must beat 15 puzzle levels, do a little work for your superior and ask your boss for a promotion which might be harder than it seems.

Now go ahead and have a cup of coffee. You'll need it.
